title: Fix deployment error and redeploy application

requirements.text: Diagnose and fix the deployment error that occurred during the previous network deployment attempt by reviewing canister configuration, dependencies, and build artifacts

quotes: Fix the deployment error and deploy it again

acceptanceCriteria: Deployment error is identified and resolved
All canisters deploy to the network without failures

requirements.text: Verify that the backend main.mo actor compiles correctly with all existing type definitions (ContactFormEntry, ProductDetail, NutritionData, ProductVariant) and function signatures
acceptanceCriteria: Backend Motoko code compiles without syntax or type errors
All query and update functions are accessible

requirements.text: Verify that the frontend build completes successfully with all dependencies resolved, including React, TanStack Router, React Query, Tailwind CSS, and Internet Identity integration
acceptanceCriteria: Static assets (images, CSS) are bundled properly

requirements.text: Ensure all generated images referenced in the frontend code exist in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory to prevent missing resource errors during deployment
acceptanceCriteria: All image paths referenced in components resolve to actual files
No 404 errors for static assets during runtime

requirements.text: Redeploy the application to the Internet Computer network after all deployment errors have been resolved and verified
acceptanceCriteria: Application successfully deploys to the network
All pages are accessible via the deployed URL

constraints: Do not modify the single-actor backend architecture
Preserve all existing features and functionality during deployment fixes
Do not change Internet Identity integration or authentication hooks
Maintain the existing color scheme and design aesthetic
